title: Include subitem columns in 'Message' input field suggestions
excerpt:
Integration-type features are made up of Workflow blocks, which contain input fields. The ‘Message’ input field provides a text area and also displays a list of item columns, which can be added to the message.

posts.author: arodriguez (arodriguez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Integration-type features are made up of Workflow blocks, which contain input fields. The ‘Message’ input field provides a text area and also displays a list of item columns, which can be added to the message.
However, this list does not include the columns from subitems.
For this reason, we request that subitem columns also appear in the suggestions of the ‘Message’ input field.
Thanks in advance.

posts.author: MichaelTomar (Michael Tomar)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love to see this too. For now, the only way I’ve managed is to mirror key subitem data to the main item using automations or make/integrations, but it’s extra setup and not as smooth as just pulling the column directly.
